name: TA Seattle East (North Bend)
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America truck stop at I-90 Exit 34, the first major truck stop east of Seattle, with roughly 140 truck spaces, diesel lanes, showers, restaurants and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop (Cle Elum)
description: Love's Travel Stop serving I-90 traffic in Cle Elum with fuel, a convenience store, showers and an adjacent Speedco truck-service facility.

name: Love's Travel Stop #413 (Ellensburg)
description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-90 Exit 106 with about 85 truck spaces, 7 fuel lanes, showers, Subway, a CAT Scale and an on-site Speedco truck-care shop.

name: Pilot Travel Center #1195 (Ellensburg)
description: 24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-90 Exit 106 with roughly 64 truck spaces, 8 diesel lanes, showers, laundry and a quick-service restaurant.

name: Broadway Flying J Travel Plaza #965 (Ellensburg)
description: Flying J-branded (Broadway Group / ONE9) travel plaza at I-90 Exit 109 with about 100 truck spaces, diesel lanes, showers, a driver's lounge and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale - TA Seattle East (North Bend)
description: CAT certified truck scale located at the TA travel center at I-90 Exit 34.

name: CAT Scale - Love's #413 (Ellensburg)
description: CAT certified truck scale at the I-90 Exit 106 Love's/Pilot travel-center complex in Ellensburg.

name: CAT Scale - Broadway Flying J #965 (Ellensburg)
description: CAT certified truck scale at the Broadway Flying J travel plaza at I-90 Exit 109.

name: North Bend Weigh Station (Westbound)
description: WSDOT commercial-vehicle weigh station on the I-90 westbound entrance ramp near Exit 25 (I-90/SR 18) at about milepost 25.5.

name: Cle Elum Weigh Station (Westbound)
description: WSDOT commercial-vehicle weigh station on I-90 westbound near Cle Elum at about milepost 80.

name: Indian John Hill Rest Area (Eastbound)
description: WSDOT rest area on I-90 eastbound at about milepost 89 east of Cle Elum with restrooms, truck/RV parking and an RV dump station.

name: Indian John Hill Rest Area (Westbound)
description: WSDOT rest area on I-90 westbound at about milepost 89 with restrooms and truck/RV parking.

name: Speedco (Cle Elum)
description: Love's-affiliated Speedco truck-service location offering oil/lube, light mechanical work, tire service and roadside assistance near I-90 in Cle Elum.

name: Speedco Truck Lube & Tires (Ellensburg)
description: Speedco/Love's Truck Care shop at the I-90 Exit 106 Love's, offering oil changes, PM service, tire sales and mounting, and light mechanical repair.

name: Gibson Truck Wash
description: Semi truck and trailer wash facility off I-90 near Exit 106 in Ellensburg.

name: Cascade Truck & RV Wash
description: Truck and RV wash located near the I-90 Exit 106 travel-center cluster in Ellensburg.

name: Love's Travel Stop #827
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop at I-90 Exit 174 with 80 truck parking spaces, 7 showers, Taco John's, laundry and a CAT scale.

name: Ernie's Truck Stop
description: Independent 24-hour truck stop at I-90 Exit 179 with certified scales, showers, deli/fast food, laundry, truckers lounge and repair services.

name: Love's Travel Stop #514
description: 24-hour Love's travel stop at I-90 Exit 221 with about 86 truck parking spaces, 7 showers, Carl's Jr., tire service, two service bays and a CAT scale.

name: Jake's (Texaco/Exxon)
description: Independent 24-hour fuel stop at I-90 Exit 220 with truck parking, restaurant/deli, store and ATM.

name: Broadway Flying J Travel Plaza #963
description: 24-hour Flying J-branded travel plaza on the West Plains at I-90 Exit 276 with dining, Subway, showers and a CAT scale.

name: Broadway Flying J Travel Plaza #967
description: 24-hour Flying J-branded travel plaza at I-90 Exit 286 with the Broadway Diner, 7 showers, ~80 truck parking spaces and a CAT scale.

name: CAT Scale - Love's Moses Lake
description: Certified CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #827 at I-90 Exit 174.

name: CAT Scale - Love's Ritzville
description: Certified CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #514 at I-90 Exit 221.

name: CAT Scale - Broadway Flying J Spokane
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Broadway Flying J Travel Plaza at I-90 Exit 276.

name: CAT Scale - Broadway Flying J Spokane Valley
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Broadway Flying J Travel Plaza at I-90 Exit 286.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Spokane
description: Blue Beacon truck and trailer wash on the West Plains near I-90 Exit 272 offering exterior washes, trailer washouts and engine wash.

name: Love's Truck Tire Care - Ritzville
description: Tire service and two truck service bays at Love's Travel Stop #514 at I-90 Exit 221.

name: Tokio Weigh Station
description: Washington State Patrol weigh station serving both eastbound and westbound I-90 at Exit 231 (Tokio), northeast of Ritzville.

name: Schrag Safety Rest Area
description: WSDOT rest area at I-90 milepost 198 (about 22.8 miles west of Ritzville) with restrooms, potable water, dump station and pet area.

name: Sprague Lake Safety Rest Area
description: WSDOT rest area at I-90 milepost ~241 (about 20 miles east of Ritzville) with restrooms, potable water, vending and pet area.
